title: Skateboarding 滑板
scene: Max在教Zoe学滑板，从站上板开始。

lines.en: Max, can you teach me how to skateboard?
Of course! First, put one foot on the board.
lines.zh: 当然可以！首先，把一只脚放在板上。
像这样吗？感觉摇摇晃晃的。

lines.en: Bend your knees a little. That helps you balance.
lines.zh: 膝盖稍微弯曲。那样有助于保持平衡。

lines.en: OK, I feel better now. What is next?
lines.zh: 好的，我现在感觉好多了。下一步呢？

lines.en: Push off with your other foot gently.
Whoa! I am moving! It is so fast!
You are doing great! Now try to stop.
lines.zh: 你做得很好！现在试着停下来。

lines.en: How do I stop? I am scared!
Just put your back foot on the ground.
lines.zh: 把后脚放在地上就好了。

lines.en: I stopped! That was so cool!
